title: 36 Pieces Small Wooden Spoons Wooden Makeup Spatulas Wooden Cosmetic Spoons Mini Nature Wooden Beauty Scoop for Women Girls Mixing Makeup, Facial Cosmetic, Skin Care
description:
Sufficient quantity: there are 36 pieces small wooden spoons, enough quantity for your daily use and replacement, meet your different needs in using various skin care products, or you can give out to your friends, colleagues, and family members
Practical shape: our wooden makeup spatulas are designed with a groove of enough depth, which makes it conveniently and easily apply the liquids inside, scoop out enough quantity you want without putting your fingers in the jars and repeated scooping
Durable quality: our wooden cosmetic spoons are made of idea natural wood, what you get are polished spoons, they are smooth in surface and comfortable to touch, durable than other plastic material, so you won't get hurt when using them, can use each one for a long time after cleaning
Easy to carry: every piece of these mini nature wooden spoons is approx. 9 cm/ 3.54 inch, they are portable for you to use and carry around, light in weight and cute in looks, you can put them in your small backpack, cosmetics bag, even your pocket without causing you too much burden
Functional in many ways: our beauty scoops are suitable for your use in the long-distance travel and daily skin care procedure, helping you to easily scoop makeup from the jar, preventing any dirt from getting inside, keeping your precious cream, lotion, essentials, etc. clean
